entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A crop playing a crucial role in the rural economy and nutrition of rural households in Mali

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: The country where the study on sorghum-based cropping systems was conducted

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INTENSIFICATION TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technologies aimed at increasing crop productivity, the adoption of which is limited by farmers' preferences

entities.name: FARMERS' PREFERENCES
entities.description: The preferences of smallholder farmers regarding attributes of sorghum technologies

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: A framework for developing agricultural technologies that balance productivity with sustainability

entities.name: DISCRETE CHOICE EXPERIMENT
entities.description: A method used to assess preferences by asking individuals to choose between hypothetical scenarios

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: An attribute of sustainable intensification related to the amount of grain produced

entities.name: RISK OF YIELD LOSS
entities.description: An attribute of sustainable intensification regarding the potential for crop failure

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: An attribute of sustainable intensification concerning the nutrient status of the soil

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: An attribute of sustainable intensification focusing on the nutritional value of the crop

entities.name: LABOR REQUIREMENT
entities.description: An attribute of sustainable intensification regarding the amount of work needed

entities.name: FODDER YIELD
entities.description: An attribute of sustainable intensification related to the amount of animal feed produced

entities.name: MIXED LOGIT MODEL
entities.description: A statistical model used to analyze the data from the discrete choice experiment

entities.name: MULTINOMIAL LOGIT MODEL
entities.description: A statistical model used as a robustness check for the data analysis

entities.name: SOCIAL NETWORKS
entities.description: A characteristic used to categorize sub-groups of smallholder farmers and analyze their preferences

entities.name: AGROECOLOGICAL ZONES
entities.description: Environmental regions used to categorize sub-groups of smallholder farmers and analyze their preferences
